sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40966" key="e)pista/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστάκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wool used for dropping oil</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl>(?) ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:19:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.19.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
